ConnectionStrings.//: Intentionally empty. A committed credential is a disclosed credential — git history outlives any later deletion. Set the value in user secrets: dotnet user-secrets set "ConnectionStrings:Cda" "..." --project app/src/CDA.Web, or supply the environment variable ConnectionStrings__Cda. See Documentation/devplan.md section 2.1.

Email.//: No Host means no mail is sent: the application says so plainly and leaves notifications queued rather than discarding them. UserName and Password belong in user secrets or the environment (Email__UserName, Email__Password), never here.

Attachments.//: Must stay outside wwwroot. Anywhere the web server publishes would make uploads reachable by URL with no access check.
